title: Accessibility
description: The National Institute of Standards and Technology is committed to making its web sites accessible to all NIST customers and staff in acc
text:
The National Institute of Standards and Technology is committed to making its web sites accessible to all NIST customers and staff in accordance with provisions of Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act Amendments of 1998.
In addition, we follow the Department of Commerce Accessibility Policy.
If you require any accommodation (e.g., captioning, sign language interpreting, mobility, etc.) to fully participate in any event or engagement, please reach out to the host or session coordinator directly.
